title: hieracium praecox subsp. glaucinum
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. glaucinum, also known as hawkweed or false hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium praecox subsp. glaucinum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
